offer: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We convert purchase orders into vendor payment schedules instead of manual tracking of payment schedules.
problem: Delayed payments leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of purchase orders and export payment schedules to CSV on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
